Petition For Removal Of Administrator And For Appointment Of Successor Administrator
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wallis Lim for Wong Ping. Clifton Lowe (proposed Successor Administrator) also present.

Mr. Lim stated that Ms. Ping is incapacitated, in a nursing home and unable to sign anything. The Court granted the Petition for Removal of Administrator and appointed Clifton Lowe as Successor Administrator with bond in the amount of $50,000.00 (subject to review of the orders). Status on close of the Estate was set for December 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
